lemon_market_new_listings.description: The vehicle is in fair condition. It shows noticeable wear on both the interior and exterior. All major systems are currently functional, though the vehicle may require mechanical attention or maintenance in the near future.

This vehicle is in fair condition and would serve well as a reliable daily driver for someone willing to put in a little cosmetic and mechanical TLC. The engine starts and runs, though it has a minor oil seep and the transmission shifts a bit roughly when cold. On the exterior, there are noticeable scratches on the passenger side doors and some fading on the clear coat on the roof. Inside, the driver's seat shows significant wear and there is a small tear in the upholstery. The tires have about 30% tread remaining, and the brake pads will likely need replacement within the next few thousand miles. It’s a solid car overall but shows its age and mileage clearly.

This exceptional vehicle is in showroom-perfect condition, having been meticulously preserved and maintained to the highest standards. The exterior paint is flawless, retaining its original factory luster without a single scratch, dent, or stone chip. The interior is equally pristine, with the upholstery and trim showing zero signs of wear, and it still retains a fresh, clean scent. Mechanically, the car performs flawlessly; the engine runs quietly and powerfully, the transmission shifts with precision, and the suspension provides a smooth, like-new ride. Every electronic component, from the infotainment system to the climate control, is in perfect working order. This is a rare find for a discerning buyer looking for a vehicle that looks and drives exactly as it did when it first left the dealership lot.
This vehicle is in poor condition. It exhibits significant wear on both the interior and exterior. The car requires major mechanical repairs and is not currently in reliable working order.
Good condition.

Calling all mechanics and DIY enthusiasts! This vehicle is a fantastic project car offered at a budget-friendly price. While it requires significant mechanical repairs and bodywork to return to its former glory, it's a wonderful opportunity to own this model for a fraction of the cost. Sold as-is, this car is ready for someone with the skills and vision to give it a new lease on life!

We are pleased to present this exemplary vehicle, maintained to the highest standards of automotive excellence. This unit exhibits a pristine aesthetic and mechanical profile, reflective of its low-mileage history and fastidious ownership. Every detail, from the flawless exterior finish to the immaculate interior appointments, underscores its status as a premier specimen. This is an unparalleled opportunity for the discerning enthusiast who demands absolute perfection.

Hey there! I'm selling my absolute pride and joy, and honestly, it looks like it just rolled off the showroom floor. It's been pampered since day one, kept in a climate-controlled garage, and there's not a single scratch or dent to be found! It drives like an absolute dream and still has that fresh car smell inside. I'm sad to see it go, but I know the next owner is going to be over the moon with it. Feel free to reach out if you want to come take a look!

Offering a collector-grade E46 BMW M3 in impeccable condition. This example features the legendary S54 3.2L inline-six, utilizing individual throttle bodies and double-VANOS to deliver a linear powerband up to its 8,000 RPM redline. The Getrag 6-speed manual transmission provides tactile engagement, sending power through a fresh limited-slip differential. Mechanical provenance is documented, including preventative subframe reinforcement and a comprehensive VANOS overhaul. The chassis remains taut with zero bushing deflection, and the exterior finish is flawless, free of rock chips or swirl marks. This is a turnkey specimen for the enthusiast seeking peak atmospheric performance.
Pristine condition. Flawless interior and exterior. Zero mechanical issues. Clean title in hand. Garage kept.

Step into automotive perfection with this meticulously preserved masterpiece. This vehicle is in truly exceptional condition, appearing as though it just rolled off the showroom floor. The exterior boasts a deep, mirror-like finish with zero imperfections, protected by a high-end ceramic coating that makes the paint pop. Inside, the cabin is a sanctuary of luxury; the premium leather seats show no signs of wear, the dashboard is pristine, and the 'new car' scent still lingers. Every electronic feature, from the panoramic sunroof to the immersive surround-sound system, functions flawlessly. Mechanically, this car is beyond reproach. It has been strictly garage-kept, serviced exclusively at authorized dealerships, and driven with the utmost care. With a complete service history and

Presented for your consideration is a vehicle of exceptional caliber, maintained to an exacting standard. This example remains in pristine, showroom condition, reflecting meticulous ownership and an uncompromising commitment to preservation. Every detail, from the flawless exterior finish to the immaculate interior appointments, underscores its status as an investment-grade acquisition. We invite discerning buyers to experience a standard of excellence rarely encountered on the secondary market.

Presenting an exceptional vehicle maintained to the highest standards of automotive excellence. This unit remains in pristine, showroom condition, exhibiting no discernible wear and reflecting a history of meticulous stewardship. Engineered for the discerning driver who demands uncompromising quality, this vehicle represents a rare opportunity to acquire a specimen in truly impeccable form.

Hey there! I'm parting with my absolute pride and joy. This beauty is in truly incredible shape—honestly, it looks and feels like it just rolled off the showroom floor! It's been meticulously cared for and is ready for a new home. You really have to see it in person to believe how pristine it is. Let's get you behind the wheel of your dream car!

This S54-powered E46 M3 represents the pinnacle of naturally aspirated performance, preserved in concours-level condition. The 3.2L inline-six features a high-compression ratio and individual throttle bodies, providing instantaneous throttle response and a screaming 8,000 RPM redline. Power is delivered via a precise Getrag 6-speed manual gearbox to a variable M differential lock, ensuring optimal traction and corner-exit stability. The chassis is flawless, featuring documented preventative subframe reinforcement and a suspension geometry that retains its factory-spec damping and bushing integrity. This is a mechanically transparent, investment-grade vehicle with zero deferred maintenance and all original VIN tags intact.
Mint condition. Garage kept. Original paint. No mechanical issues. Clean title.

Experience perfection with this meticulously preserved vehicle, presented in absolute showroom condition. The exterior boasts a mirror-like finish with zero chips or scratches, complemented by an interior that still retains its factory-fresh scent and shows no signs of wear on the premium upholstery. Mechanically, it is beyond reproach, featuring a comprehensive, dealer-stamped service history and exceptionally low mileage that ensures a driving experience indistinguishable from new. Every feature, from the advanced infotainment system to the climate control, functions flawlessly. This is a rare opportunity to own a virtually untouched example of automotive excellence, maintained to the highest possible standard for the most discerning collector.

Presenting an exceptional specimen maintained to the highest standards of automotive excellence. Its aesthetic and mechanical integrity are absolute, catering to the most discerning collector who demands nothing less than perfection.

This specimen represents a rare opportunity for the discerning collector, featuring a flawless exterior finish and a pristine interior that remains indistinguishable from new. Every mechanical component has been rigorously inspected to ensure peak performance, offering an unparalleled driving experience for those who demand absolute excellence.

Hey there! I’m selling my absolute pride and joy, and honestly, it’s a total stunner. This car is in truly incredible shape—it looks and feels like it just rolled right off the showroom floor! I’ve taken meticulous care of it, and you won't find a single scratch or speck of dust anywhere. It drives like an absolute dream and still has that 'new car' magic. If you're looking for a ride that’s been totally pampered and is ready for its next big adventure, this is definitely the one for you! Come take a look, you won't be disappointed!
Offered is a pristine E46 M3, a masterclass in naturally aspirated performance featuring the S54 3.2
Mint condition. Single owner. Garage kept. No scratches or dents. Full service records included.

This vehicle is a true time capsule, presented in breathtaking showroom condition. The exterior paint retains a deep, mirror-like luster with no chips, swirls, or imperfections, having been professionally detailed and strictly garage-kept under a soft cover. Inside, the cabin is indistinguishable from new; the premium leather remains supple without a single crease, and the factory-fresh scent persists. Mechanically, the car is beyond reproach, featuring a comprehensive service history with every maintenance milestone performed ahead of schedule by certified specialists. From the pristine engine bay to the untouched undercarriage, every component functions with precision. This is a rare opportunity for a discerning collector to own a flawless example that has been pampered since day one.

We are proud to present this exceptional vehicle, preserved in a state that rivals its original showroom condition. Every detail of this automobile reflects a commitment to uncompromising excellence, from the flawless exterior finish to the pristine interior appointments. This is a rare opportunity to acquire a specimen of singular quality, perfectly suited for the discerning individual who demands nothing less than perfection.

We are proud to offer this superlative specimen, presented in pristine, showroom-ready condition. Meticulously maintained and showing no signs of compromise, this vehicle represents the pinnacle of its class. Its aesthetic and mechanical integrity are absolute, making it an ideal acquisition for the most exacting enthusiast who demands nothing short of perfection.

Hi there! I'm so excited to share this absolute beauty with you! This car is honestly in pristine, showroom-level shape—it’s been my absolute pride and joy. It drives like a dream and looks virtually brand new inside and out. If you're looking for something that’s been pampered and is ready for its next adventure, this is definitely the one for you!

This E46 M3 is a pristine example of Bavarian engineering, featuring the legendary S54 3.2L inline-six power plant with individual throttle bodies and high-pressure double VANOS. Power is delivered through a crisp 6-speed Getrag manual transmission to a variable M-differential lock. The chassis remains factory-stiff with documented subframe reinforcement, and the suspension retains its original damping characteristics. Every seal, bushing, and mechanical component is in concours condition, offering a visceral 8,000 RPM redline experience. Zero deferred maintenance; a true collector-grade specimen.
Mint condition. Garage kept. Single owner. No accidents. Service records available. Clean title.

This vehicle is a true collector’s dream, preserved in absolute showroom condition. The exterior features a deep, mirror-like finish with zero imperfections, protected by a professional ceramic coating and kept strictly in a climate-controlled environment. Inside, the cabin remains in a factory-fresh state, with the scent of premium leather and absolutely no wear on the bolsters, carpets, or touchpoints. Mechanically, it is beyond reproach; it has been meticulously maintained with a documented full-service history, including preventative maintenance that exceeds factory recommendations. Every button, sensor, and mechanical component operates with precision. For the buyer who demands an uncompromising example that looks and drives as if it just left the dealership, this is the perfect specimen.

Presenting an exceptional vehicle preserved in showroom condition. This specimen represents the pinnacle of automotive maintenance, boasting an impeccable exterior finish and a pristine interior that remains indistinguishable from new. Every mechanical component has been rigorously inspected to ensure it meets our uncompromising standards for excellence. For the discerning collector or enthusiast who demands nothing less than perfection, this vehicle stands as a premier example of its class.
